creator: yokota@zodiac.mech.utsunomiya-u.ac.jp
text:
>> >>Number:         12811
>> >>Category:       misc
>> >>Synopsis:       Cant get it going
[...]
>> >>Description:
>> >I put in the first floppy,reboot & get this
>> >/boot.config: -P
>> >Keyboard: no
>> >_     <=== this blinks forever.
>>
>> As soon as you see
>>
>>         Keyboard: no
>>
>> Hit the space key, and you get the "boot:" prompt.  Type "-Dh" and
>> return.  Then, you will be all right.
>>
>> For the record, would you describe your system for us?
>> Motherboard, CPU, keyboard, etc.
>>
>> Kazu
>
>Thank you for advice, I tryed it & it did not work!
>From
>            Keyboard: no
>to
>            _
>happens too fast, but I tryed it anyways.

Umm, there should be three seconds delay before the boot block finally
decides to use the serial console.... (When you see "_", it is
supposed to be waiting for three seconds before loading the boot
loader.)

Anyway, hold down the space key BEFORE the "keyboard: no" message and
keep it down until you see the boot block prompt.

Kazu
